cases.title: Scenario matrix row for out-of-radius handling when GPS policy and room coordinates are configured
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 GPS validation block applies (FR-34, FR-35, BR-08/09/10, AC-09, AC-10).
gps-required-session fixture: Open class session with effective policy gpsRequired=true, gpsRadiusMeters=100, and Room latitude/longitude configured.
Authenticated enrolled student has no successful attendance record for the session.
steps: Resolve effective attendance policy for the open session and confirm gpsRequired=true with room coordinates present.
Submit check-in command with valid qrToken and GPS coordinates farther than effective gpsRadiusMeters from session Room anchor.
Query persisted CheckInAttempt and AttendanceRecord for the student-session pair.
cases.expected: Self check-in is rejected or flagged per institution policy (OutOfRadius rejection or Suspicious flag per BR-09); distance and validation metadata are logged on CheckInAttempt; no Present/Late AttendanceRecord is created when rejection policy applies.

cases.title: GPS radius module rejects out-of-radius check-in and persists distance metadata without attendance write
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for policy resolution, GPS validation, check-in, and attendance ledger modules.
Open session exists with gpsRequired=true, room at (10.762622, 106.660172), gpsRadiusMeters=100; student is actively enrolled with no prior success record.
Institution policy configured for strict rejection on out-of-radius (default BR-09 reject path).
steps: Capture beforeState: zero Present/Late AttendanceRecord rows for (classSessionId, studentUserId).

Invoke check-in command with valid qrToken passing auth, session Open, token Valid, enrollment, and duplicate guards; supply gps coordinates approximately 162 m from room anchor (e.g. latitude 10.764080, longitude 106.660172) with accuracyMeters=24.5.
Query check_in_attempts row for outcome, distanceMeters, allowedRadiusMeters, and attendance_records within the same transaction boundary.
cases.expected: GPS guard step 6 persists one failed CheckInAttempt with outcome OutOfRadius and validation metadata (distanceMeters > allowedRadiusMeters); AttendanceRecord row count remains zero and beforeState is unchanged.

cases.title: CheckInAttempt SM-04 terminates at OutOfRadius without attendance mutation
preconditions: Open gps-required session with valid qrToken and configured room coordinates exists in integration test database.
Authenticated enrolled student has no existing successful attendance for the session.
Submitted GPS coordinates are outside effective gpsRadiusMeters per BR-09.
steps: Capture beforeState: session roster shows student in Pending with no success AttendanceRecord.
Submit check-in command that passes validation order steps 1–5 but fails GPS distance check at step 6.
Capture afterState for CheckInAttempt outcome and AttendanceRecord rows.
cases.expected: SM-04 evaluation reaches OutOfRadius terminal state at GPS policy guard; afterState shows persisted failed attempt with OutOfRadius and distance validation metadata; AttendanceRecord identical to beforeState (still Pending, no success write).

cases.title: Institution flag policy accepts out-of-radius check-in with Suspicious outcome per BR-09 alternate path
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for policy resolution and check-in modules.
Open gps-required session with room coordinates configured; institution policy sets outOfRadiusAction=flag (accept with Suspicious) rather than strict reject.
Authenticated enrolled student has no prior success record; GPS coordinates are outside configured radius.
steps: Submit check-in command with valid qrToken and out-of-radius GPS payload under flag policy configuration.
Query CheckInAttempt for outcome Suspicious and validation metadata (distanceMeters, allowedRadiusMeters).
Query AttendanceRecord and session roster for the student row.
cases.expected: Per BR-09 exception path, check-in is accepted with Suspicious flag rather than hard OutOfRadius rejection; CheckInAttempt logs distance and validation result; attendance state reflects flagged outcome for lecturer review without silent success as Present.

cases.title: POST /v1/check-ins returns 422 OutOfRadius with distance details when coordinates exceed radius
preconditions: Open gps-required session with room coordinates and gpsRadiusMeters=100 exists in test environment.
Authenticated student bearer token belongs to actively enrolled user with no prior success for the session.
Valid qrToken is available for the open session.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins with Authorization Bearer token, valid qrToken, clientTimestamp, and gps payload with coordinates outside allowed radius (e.g. distanceMeters > 100).
Inspect HTTP status, response envelope (data/meta/error), error.code, and error.details.
Verify no success attendance payload is returned.
cases.expected: API returns 422 with standard envelope where data is null and error.code is OutOfRadius; error.details includes distanceMeters and allowedRadiusMeters per API design §4.4; no Present/Late attendance row is created.

cases.title: FLOW-03 alternate branch rejects out-of-radius check-in with auditable attempt and manual fallback path
preconditions: Lecturer has opened gps-required session (AC-01) with room coordinates configured and session is Open with rotating QR.
Student completes login gate (AC-06) and enrollment validation (AC-07) prerequisites.
Student device supplies GPS coordinates outside configured radius.
steps: Student calls POST /v1/auth/login and receives Student role accessToken.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and out-of-radius gps payload.
Lecturer queries GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for the student row and rejectedAttempts count.
Lecturer applies PATCH manual correction for the same student with Manual Present and documented reason after in-person verification.
cases.expected: Check-in fails with OutOfRadius (422); roster shows student Pending with rejectedAttempts incremented and failed attempt auditable per AC-18 with distance metadata; lecturer manual fallback succeeds per BR-14 without bypassing audit requirements.

cases.title: Boundary distinguishes within-radius success from just-beyond-radius OutOfRadius rejection
preconditions: Open gps-required session with room at known anchor and gpsRadiusMeters=100 exists.
Authenticated enrolled student has no successful attendance for the session.
Test harness can supply deterministic GPS coordinates at 99 m (pass) and 101 m (fail) from room anchor.
steps: Submit POST /v1/check-ins with valid token and gps coordinates approximately 99 m from room anchor; record status and outcome.
Reset student attempt state or use a second enrolled student for the fail case.
Submit POST /v1/check-ins with valid token and gps coordinates approximately 101 m from room anchor; record status and error.code.
Verify CheckInAttempt metadata and AttendanceRecord outcomes for both submissions.
cases.expected: Within-radius submission (99 m) proceeds past GPS distance guard to Present/Late assignment; just-beyond-radius submission (101 m) returns 422 with error.code OutOfRadius and logs distanceMeters/allowedRadiusMeters; boundary enforces effective gpsRadiusMeters per BR-09.

cases.title: Non-Student roles denied POST /v1/check-ins with out-of-radius GPS payload
preconditions: Open gps-required session with valid QR token and configured room coordinates exists.
Lecturer and ITAdmin identities are available with valid bearer tokens per permission matrix.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins as Lecturer with valid qrToken and out-of-radius gps payload for the open session.
Call POST /v1/check-ins as ITAdmin with the same token context.
Call POST /v1/check-ins as enrolled Student (control) with out-of-radius gps coordinates.
Verify denial responses contain no partial attendance mutation from privileged roles.
cases.expected: Lecturer and ITAdmin receive 403 Forbidden before GPS radius evaluation; Student control reaches business validation and receives 422 OutOfRadius; no AttendanceRecord is created by denied roles.

cases.title: UI journey surfaces failure-out-of-radius warning with recovery guidance and lecturer fallback hint
preconditions: Student is logged in on mobile-web browser (PG-02 check-in page).
Target session has gpsRequired=true, room coordinates configured, and is Open with valid QR token.
Browser geolocation is granted but test profile supplies coordinates outside configured radius.
steps: Navigate to check-in URL with valid token query parameter for the gps-required session.
Grant browser location permission when prompted per FLOW-03 step 2.
Submit check-in from the student check-in form with out-of-radius coordinates.
Observe CheckInResultScreen failure-out-of-radius warning styling, recovery steps, and lecturer fallback guidance.
cases.expected: UI renders failure-out-of-radius alert with localized message (e.g. 'Ngoài phạm vi lớp'); recovery copy prompts student to move closer or báo giảng viên for manual fallback; no success status is shown and student remains Pending on roster.

cases.title: Lecturer roster shows OutOfRadius rejected attempt with distance metadata visible for review
preconditions: Student has failed OutOfRadius check-in attempt on an Open gps-required session with distance metadata logged.
Lecturer is authenticated on desktop browser (PG-06 live roster view) for the assigned section.
Manual edit window is active per effective policy.
steps: Lecturer navigates to live session roster for the gps-required session.
Locate the student row showing Pending status with latestAttemptOutcome OutOfRadius in rejected summary.
Verify distance or out-of-radius indicator is visible for lecturer review per WF-04 §6.5.
Open ManualCorrectionDialog and submit Manual Present correction with required reason after in-person verification.
cases.expected: Roster displays student as Pending with OutOfRadius rejection visible in attempt summary including review metadata; ManualCorrectionDialog accepts correction; post-save row updates to Manual Present confirming lecturer fallback path remains operable per AC-10 and BR-14.
